meta.title: Gabriel Ribeiro — Fullstack Developer | React, Next.js, Node.js
meta.description: Mid-level Fullstack Developer with 4+ years of experience in React, Next.js, Node.js and TypeScript. From design to deploy: scalable web applications, APIs and digital products.

hero.pitch: Building web applications end to end for over 4 years — currently crafting solutions for large-scale live events at Zig, with React, Next.js, Node.js and TypeScript.

about.title: From help desk to the stages of Brazil's biggest live events
